description: Individual step definition for TmImportWizard. Only renders its content when the step is active. Provides title, description, and icon metadata for the step indicator.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Optional description for the step indicator.

examples.title: Wizard step with description
examples.code:
<TmImportWizardStep Title="Configure" Description="Set import options" Icon="settings">
    <TmSelect TValue="string" @bind-Value="delimiter" Label="Delimiter" Options="@delimiterOptions" />
</TmImportWizardStep>
